text.text: It's rare for someone to see the gaps in this world
You do know these walls are here to mess with you right?
They aren't all easy to find you know, maybe some are too easy...
What am I going to reward with you this time...
Perhaps you'll survive long enough, to reclaim at least a tiny part
All you want is technology, almost wonder how annoyed you would be if I gave you a collection of rare seeds instead
You know, I had to write these while I was eepy, a lot of notes to write to a lot of survivors you know?
Maybe including these notes was superflourous, you would have instantly known an otherworldly being put these here
Only places with sealed walls can store these you know that. Well at least I hoped you knew that
